## Success Condition

If Jenya does not actively use this app weekly without prompting, the product fails.

## Required UX Principles

- Zero learning curve
- Calm, uncluttered design
- No productivity guilt language
- Supportive, assistive tone

## Required Features

- “What’s next today?” view
- “Prep for tomorrow” reminders
- One-tap actions:
  - Add to calendar
  - Add to groceries
  - Repeat last week’s meals
- Tags:
  - Kid-approved
  - Fast
  - Leftovers
  - Adult-only

## Acceptance Criteria

- App reduces decision fatigue
- App replaces ad-hoc texting and mental notes
- UI feels trustworthy and calm
